message:
Extend snapshot service with additional collectors

- Add more system state collectors to snapshot service
- Track progress in beads

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -63,7 +63,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-2sx6","title":"Audit /dp tool repos vs ACFS manifest coverage","description":"Goal:
- Audit recent /dp tool repos vs ACFS manifest coverage; document any gaps.

Scope:
- Identify tools not yet represented in acfs.manifest.yaml.
- Decide whether they are part of public stack.
- Output a short checklist of additions for ACFS repo maintainers.

Definition of Done:
- Clear gap list exists with recommended manifest updates (if any).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:48:15.974268171Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T04:51:34.406888298Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acfs","audit","integration"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2sx6","depends_on_id":"bd-1hac","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:48:16.228058195Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2sx6","depends_on_id":"bd-2k5b","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:51:34.406793049Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-2wwp","title":"Tests: NTM backpressure + rate limiting","description":"Goal:\n- Add tests for NTM ingest backpressure/throttling.\n\nScope:\n- Rate limit behavior, batching, and critical event delivery.\n- Structured logging assertions for throttling decisions.\n\nDefinition of Done:\n- Tests validate rate limits and do not drop critical events.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:49:01.613349781Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T05:49:17.809613720Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ntm","performance","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2wwp","depends_on_id":"bd-284u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:49:01.638783038Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2wwp","depends_on_id":"bd-pbt2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:49:17.809555600Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2xj3","title":"Map manifest optional/tags/phase into readiness scoring","description":"Goal:
- Map manifest optional/enabled_by_default/tags/phase into readiness scoring and install ordering.

Scope:
- Define which tags imply "required" vs "recommended" vs "optional" in readiness summary.
- Expose phase ordering for UI install guidance.

Tests / Verification (detailed logging required):
- Harness: bd-a1jg (readiness/install scenarios).
- E2E: bd-1uog (UI grouping + ordering).

Definition of Done:
- Readiness output includes required/recommended/optional lists and phase ordering.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:48:01.212896043Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T09:22:25.713138275Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acfs","integration","registry","setup"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2xj3","depends_on_id":"bd-1hac","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:48:01.446167385Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2xj3","depends_on_id":"bd-1sz8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:51:25.659760341Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2xj3","depends_on_id":"bd-20kj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:07:24.731209513Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2xj3","depends_on_id":"bd-2k5b","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:07:10.750977926Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2xj3","depends_on_id":"bd-jpwu","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:07:38.108993617Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2xj3","depends_on_id":"bd-ka28","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:26:32.426515810Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2xku","title":"Web UI: setup/tools reflect manifest categories + install order","description":"Goal:
- Update setup/ tools UI to reflect manifest categories, phase ordering, and required vs optional tools.

Scope:
- Visual grouping by phase/category.
- Badge for required/recommended/optional.
- Safe display of install command/verified installer.

Definition of Done:
- Setup UI displays manifest-derived tool info and install guidance.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:48:11.196029868Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T04:51:32.348751349Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["setup","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2xku","depends_on_id":"bd-1hac","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:48:11.376981508Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2xku","depends_on_id":"bd-20kj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:51:32.348689733Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2xku","depends_on_id":"bd-2xj3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:51:30.005971562Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
